2. set a label for the current node
3. instruct the agent to do the thing you'd normally use a subagent for

5. /tree and go back to the labeled node
6. continue by reading the result :)

graphNodes.name: What distinguishes LCM from RLMs is *how* we perform recursi
graphNodes.text_preview:
What distinguishes LCM from RLMs is *how* we perform recursion.

RLM uses symbolic recursion: i.e., it has the model write scripts to call itself. 

We decompose this functionality into *deterministic primitives* so that an engine can manage the control flow.
